Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 101: Received 2024-03-01 08:00, closed 2024-03-01 10:15. Thats a duration of about 2 hours 15 minutes (2h15m). Exactly: from 08:00 to 10:15 is 2h15m. Case 102: Received 2024-03-01 08:05, closed 2024-03-02 09:15. Thats roughly 1 day + 1h10m = about 25 hours 10 minutes (or 25h10m). Lets compute exactly: 2024-03-01 08:05 to 2024-03-02 09:15. Thats 24h + (09:15 - 08:05) = 24h + 1h10m = 25h10m. So ~25.17 hours. Case 103: Received 2024-03-01 08:10, closed 2024-03-01 09:30. Thats 1h20m. Case 104: Received 2024-03-01 08:20, closed 2024-03-02 08:30. Thats about 24h10m. Lets compute: 2024-03-01 08:20 to 2024-03-02 08:30 = 24h + 10m = 24h10m. Case 105: Received 2024-03-01 08:25, closed 2024-03-03 09:30. Thats roughly 2 days + 1h5m = 48h + (09:30 - 08:25) = 48h + 1h5m = 49h5m.

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: - 2h15 = 135 minutes. - 25h10 = 25*60 + 10 = 1500 + 10 = 1510 minutes. - 1h20 = 80 minutes. - 24h10 = 24*60 + 10 = 1440 + 10 = 1450 minutes. - 49h5 = 49*60 + 5 = 2940 + 5 = 2945 minutes. Sum = 135 + 1510 + 80 + 1450 + 2945 = 6120 minutes. Average = 6120/5 = 1224 minutes = 20.4 hours. So average resolution time approx 20.4 hours. Cases 102 (25.2h) and 104 (24.2h) and 105 (49.1h) are above average. However, the question says significantly longer. Likely 105 is the outlier, with resolution time more than double the average. 102 and 104 also above average but not as extreme.

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Cases 102, 104, 105 have escalations (Escalate to Level-2 Agent). Actually, case 102 includes Escalate to Level-2 Agent after Assign to Level-1 Agent, then Investigate Issue. Case 104: No escalation event appears. Case 105: Has escalation at 09:10, then Investigate at March 2 14:00. Thus, pattern: escalations cause significant delays because Level-2 has a backlog and can only investigate later. Also after investigation, resolution step is delayed.

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For case 101: durations: Receive to Triage (10 min), Triage to Assign (10 min), Assign to Investigate (40 min), Investigate to Resolve (60 min), Resolve to Close (15 min). Case 102: durations: - Receive to Triage: 08:05 -> 08:30 = 25 min. - Triage to Assign: 08:30 -> 09:00 = 30 min. - Assign to Escalate: 09:00 -> 11:30 = 2h30 = 150 min. - Escalate to Investigate: 11:30 -> 14:00 = 2h30 = 150 min. - Investigate to Resolve: 14:00 (Mar1) -> 09:00 (Mar2) = 19h = 1140 min. - Resolve to Close: 09:00 -> 09:15 = 15 min. Case 103: quick. Case 104: durations: - Receive to Triage: 08:20 -> 09:00 = 40 min. - Triage to Assign: 09:00 -> 09:30 = 30 min. - Assign to Investigate: 09:30 -> 13:00 = 3h30 = 210 min. - Investigate to Resolve: 13:00 (Mar1) -> 08:00 (Mar2) = 19h = 1140 min. Case 105: durations: ... main delays: after escalation, long wait before L2 starts investigation; after L2 investigation, long wait before resolution.

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Thus root causes: (1) Escalation to higher-tier agents is causing significant delays due to limited availability of Level-2 agents and longer processing times; (2) L1 agents may be delayed in starting investigation due to workload or lack of clarity; (3) Post-investigation waiting times may be due to required approvals, testing, or dependency on external parties; (4) Possibly suboptimal triage or misclassification causing escalation.

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Stage durations: - Receive -> Triage: ... avg = 18 min. - Triage -> Assign: avg = 22 min. - Assign -> Investigate (or Escalate if present): average = 85 min. Variation high. - Investigate -> Resolve: average = 702 min = 11.7h. Thus main delays are in assign->investigate/escalate and investigate->resolve.

Name: Deductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Data: durations: 135, 1510, 80, 1450, 2945 minutes. mean: 1224 min. ... Std dev = 1182.3 min. z-score for 105: 1.45.

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Recommendations: - Increase Level-2 capacity or cross-train Level-1 agents. - Implement SLAs for escalation response. - Identify patterns that trigger escalations and preemptively assign to Level-2. - Improve handoff processes. - Introduce monitoring dashboards.
